blur_detection.description: The text and edges show moderate blur, likely due to camera movement or out-of-focus capture.
blur_detection.recommendation: Re-capture the image with a steady camera and ensure the document is in focus.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is adequate but could be improved for better readability.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Ensure even lighting and avoid shadows when capturing the document.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure the text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discoloration detected.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, or folds detected.

cut_off_detection.description: Minor cut-off detected at the bottom edge of the document.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is within the frame when capturing.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections or incomplete content detected.

obstructions.description: No obstructions such as fingers, shadows, or objects blocking the document.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, and item description. It is classified as a travel expense due to the nature of the purchase (Swiss Half Fare Card).

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 6 out of 8 required fields, meeting the criteria for an expense document.

extraction.terms_conditions: E-Tickets are personal and not transferable. The ticket has to be presented to the control staff along with an official identity document and / or with any discount card. For refunds, T600.9 or the conditions of the relevant transport company or operator apply. Refunds of e-tickets in the context of international journeys are made in according with international terms and conditions.
extraction.special_notes: Up to 50% discount on 1st and 2nd class tickets within one month. Only valid with your Passport / ID.

issues.description: The customer name on the receipt does not match the ICP requirement for travel expenses. The ICP requires the Local Employer's name or the worker's name if the Local Employer's name cannot be used.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Worker name on travel documents: 'Exception when it is not possible to use the Local Employer's name, e.g. on flight bookings. The workers name should then be used instead'

issues.description: The document type 'Swiss Half Fare Card' does not clearly indicate it is a tax receipt or invoice as required by the receipt standards.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt/Invoice document type: 'Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not be sufficient'

issues.description: The total amount of CHF 120 for the Swiss Half Fare Card is subject to gross-up as it is not a tax-exempt expense under the provided rules.
issues.recommendation: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Gross-up for all approved business expenses: 'All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free'

issues.description: Additional documentation is required for the Swiss Half Fare Card expense to ensure compliance with travel-related expenses.
issues.recommendation: Workers should submit a separate report per each business trip and ensure all personal information not required for reimbursement purposes is removed before submission.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Additional info for business trips: 'Workers should submit a separate report per each business trip' and 'Any personal information not required for reimbursement purposes should be removed before it is submitted'

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has issues with customer name compliance, document type clarity, gross-up requirement for the total amount, and missing additional documentation for travel-related expenses.
